about.title: About Katoen Natie Sports
about.subtitle: Celebrating movement, health, and company pride across all continents.
about.wellbeingText: At Katoen Natie, we believe that physical activity is essential to wellbeing. Our global sports community connects employees and partners through shared challenges, friendly competition, and the joy of movement — because a healthy team moves the world forward.
